title: His Broad Brimmed Hat Push'd Back With Careless Air
content:
His broad brimmed hat push'd back with careless air,
The proud vaquero sits his steed as free
As winds that toss his black, abundant hair.
meaning:
Joaquin Miller's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "His Broad Brimmed Hat Push'd Back With Careless Air"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
